title: Liberal construction
doc_html:
§307. Liberal construction

            This Chapter, being necessary for the welfare of the state, and the parish and its residents shall be liberally construed to effect the purposes thereof.

            Acts 2015, No. 265, §1.
doc_text:
§307.  Liberal construction
This Chapter, being necessary for the welfare of the state, and the parish and its
residents shall be liberally construed to effect the purposes thereof.
Acts 2015, No. 265, §1.
